risks.title: Competition from Low-Cost Carriers
risks.description: Lufthansa faces intense competition from low-cost carriers like Ryanair and easyJet, making it difficult to compete on price.
risks.evidence: Wie gut ist die Lufthansa im Vergleich zur europäischen Konkurrenz?

risks.title: Pilot Strikes
risks.description: Lufthansa pilots have voted to strike in a pensions dispute, which could lead to significant disruptions and losses for the airline.
risks.evidence: Germany news  Lufthansa pilots back strike action - dw.com

risks.title: Competition from New Airlines
risks.description: Lufthansa faces competition from new airlines like Air Belgium, which could further erode its market share.
risks.evidence: Lufthansa bekommt Konkurrenz durch Air Belgium - DER SPIEGEL

risks.title: Economic Uncertainty and Competition from Premium Airlines
risks.description: Lufthansa's premium airline, Swiss, competes with other high-end airlines, making it challenging for Lufthansa to maintain its market share.
risks.evidence: Lufthansa wagt nach Gewinnrückgang und Corona keine... - airliners.de

opportunities.title: AI-Powered Flight Profile Transmission
opportunities.description: Lufthansa Group will equip new Airbus A320neo and A321neo aircraft with automated flight profile transmission technology, enhancing operational efficiency and sustainability.
opportunities.evidence: Innovation driver  Lufthansa Group invests in new technology to....

opportunities.title: Trend Forecasting and Strategic Innovation
opportunities.description: Lufthansa's Innovation Hub is leveraging trend forecasting to drive strategic innovation, enabling the airline to stay ahead of industry trends and capitalize on emerging opportunities.
opportunities.evidence: Trend Forecasting Case Study - Lufthansa Innovation Hub   Feedly

opportunities.title: AI-Based MRO Innovation
opportunities.description: Lufthansa Technik Philippines is encouraging AI-based innovation in the maintenance, repair, and overhaul (MRO) sector, with a focus on exploring cutting-edge AI technologies.
opportunities.evidence: Lufthansa Technik Philippines encourages AI-based innovation

opportunities.title: Digital Transformation through Strategic Partnerships
opportunities.description: Lufthansa Group is accelerating its digital transformation strategy through strategic partnerships, such as the extended partnership with PROS, to drive business growth and improve operational efficiency.
opportunities.evidence: PROS and Lufthansa Group Extend Strategic Partnership - Business Wire

trends.title: Digitalization of Technical Fleet Management
trends.description: Lufthansa is investing in digital systems to streamline and optimize technical fleet management processes.
trends.evidence: Newsroom Lufthansa Group - PressPage: Newsroom Lufthansa Group - PressPage

trends.title: Fleet Modernization
trends.description: Lufthansa is undergoing comprehensive fleet modernization as part of its transformation strategy.
trends.evidence: Lufthansa - Strategic Analysis and Outlook Report 2026: Lufthansa - Strategic Analysis and Outlook Report 2026

trends.title: Sustainability and Environmental Responsibility
trends.description: Lufthansa is implementing various measures to reduce emissions, including the use of sustainable aviation fuel (SAF) and fleet modernization.
trends.evidence: Klima und Umwelt - Lufthansa Group: Klima und Umwelt - Lufthansa Group

trends.title: Digital Transformation and Innovation
trends.description: Lufthansa is embracing digital transformation through initiatives such as the development of a cloud platform for optimizing maintenance, AI-powered innovations, and customer-facing chatbots.
